events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Wrong thread sealant staged for gas piping installation (not gas-rated/yellow PTFE or approved pipe dope)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged non-gas-rated thread sealant.",
    "Replace with yellow PTFE tape rated for gas (ANSI Z21.15/ASME B1.20.1) or an approved gas-rated pipe joint compound."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using non-gas-rated thread sealant on gas piping can lead to chemical degradation of the sealant by fuel gases, resulting in hazardous gas leaks. The staged materials must be corrected to code-compliant, gas-rated sealants before assembly begins.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 403.9.3",
    "NFPA 54 Section 5.6.7.4"
  ]
}
